---
title: "Comparing groups: statistical tests"
author:
  - Norah Jones
  - Bill Gates
  - Luis Francisco Gomez
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: load-r-libraries
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
```

# Introduction

Pending

# Import data

```{r}
#| message: false
segmentation <- read_csv(
    file = "../000_data/005_data_set_chapter-5.csv"
    )
```
